nodes.name: Send Reply Email
nodes.notes: Replace with SMTP node if not using Gmail

parameters.content:
## 🔥 LEAD REPLY AUTOMATION

HOW IT WORKS
A lead submits your contact form → 
Groq AI qualifies them in seconds → 
Personalized email fires automatically → 
CRM record created → Team gets Slack alert

HOW TO SET UP
1. Add Groq API key in HTTP node
2. Connect Gmail OAuth
3. Paste Google Sheet ID
4. Connect Slack account + set channel
5. Activate workflow

CUSTOMIZATION
- Change scoring threshold (default: 8 = hot)
- Edit the AI prompt to match your business
- Add more branches for different lead tiers
